'''dhadhozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadholding|roadholding]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-dh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadholding|roadholding]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhadhozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhædhezheth|dhædhezheth]] || [[word:dhædhezhej|dhædhezhej]] || [[word:dhædhezhesh|dhædhezhesh]] || [[word:dhædhezhe|dhædhezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhadhodhozhoth|dhadhodhozhoth]] || [[word:dhadhodhozhoj|dhadhodhozhoj]] || [[word:dhadhodhozhosh|dhadhodhozhosh]] || [[word:dhadhodhozho|dhadhodhozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhadhozhoth|dhadhozhoth]] || [[word:dhadhozhoj|dhadhozhoj]] || [[word:dhadhozhosh|dhadhozhosh]] || [[word:dhadhozho|dhadhozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhadhofzhofth|dhadhofzhofth]] || [[word:dhadhofzhofj|dhadhofzhofj]] || [[word:dhadhofzhofsh|dhadhofzhofsh]] || [[word:dhadhofzhof|dhadhofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhadhozhotho|dhadhozhotho]] || [[word:dhadhozhojo|dhadhozhojo]] || [[word:dhadhozhosho|dhadhozhosho]] || [[word:dhadhozhoko|dhadhozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhadhozhoth|dhadhozhoth]] || [[word:dhadhozhoj|dhadhozhoj]] || [[word:dhadhozhosh|dhadhozhosh]] || [[word:dhadhozho|dhadhozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhadhozhothol|dhadhozhothol]] || [[word:dhadhozhojol|dhadhozhojol]] || [[word:dhadhozhoshol|dhadhozhoshol]] || [[word:dhadhozhokol|dhadhozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhadhozhoothotho|dhadhozhoothotho]] || [[word:dhadhozhoojojo|dhadhozhoojojo]] || [[word:dhadhozhooshosho|dhadhozhooshosho]] || [[word:dhadhozhooko|dhadhozhooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhadhozhothon|dhadhozhothon]] || [[word:dhadhozhojon|dhadhozhojon]] || [[word:dhadhozhoshon|dhadhozhoshon]] || [[word:dhadhozhokon|dhadhozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhadhozhothooro|dhadhozhothooro]] || [[word:dhadhozhojooro|dhadhozhojooro]] || [[word:dhadhozhoshooro|dhadhozhoshooro]] || [[word:dhadhozhokooro|dhadhozhokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
